plugins.name: design-doc
plugins.description: Turn a requirement into a verifiable, implementation-ready detailed design document (SDD). Interrogates ambiguity first, then produces a design contract.

plugins.name: skill-authoring
plugins.description: House conventions and template for writing, improving, and reviewing Claude Code skills, plus this marketplace's registration flow (marketplace.json entry, version bump, local dedup).

plugins.name: flutter-dart-code-review
plugins.description: Library-agnostic Flutter/Dart code review checklist: widget best practices, state management, Dart idioms, performance, accessibility, security, clean architecture.
